completed_tasks.name: Fix Playwright browser launch in Docker
completed_tasks.detail: Added PLAYWRIGHT_CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH=/usr/bin/chromium-browser to docker-compose.yml and launchContext.launchOptions.executablePath to base.ts

completed_tasks.detail: Added MIMO_API_KEY, MIMO_BASE_URL, MIMO_MODEL, AI_PROVIDER=mimo, AI_FALLBACK_PROVIDER=openai

completed_tasks.name: Sync database schema
completed_tasks.detail: Ran drizzle-kit push to add missing columns (source_confidence etc.)

completed_tasks.name: Fix empty article content
completed_tasks.detail: Added empty response validation in article-generator.ts, post-parse validation, and generate worker guard

completed_tasks.detail: Added networkidle + 3s timeout before page.content() for JS-rendered pages

completed_tasks.name: Test all providers
completed_tasks.detail: Tested 4 remaining providers. DeepSeek 2 models, Fireworks 2 models, Together 0 (HTML 600K), xAI 0 (HTML 350K)

remaining_tasks.name: Fix Together HTML truncation
remaining_tasks.detail: HTML is 600K, exceeds 100K limit. Need smarter truncation or page-specific extraction

remaining_tasks.name: Fix xAI client-side rendering
remaining_tasks.detail: HTML 350K, pricing data may be JS-rendered despite networkidle wait

remaining_tasks.name: Add Amazon adapter
remaining_tasks.detail: amazon source exists in DB but has no adapter (separate from bedrock)

remaining_tasks.name: Commit and push all fixes
remaining_tasks.detail: All code changes need to be committed to phase branch

decisions.decision: Use system Chromium instead of Playwright's bundled browser
decisions.rationale: Alpine Linux uses musl, Playwright's Chrome needs glibc. System Chromium works natively
Only MIMO_API_KEY is available, default AI_PROVIDER=anthropic would fail
claude.com/pricing is consumer subscription page with no API per-token pricing

next_action: Commit all fixes to phase branch, then tackle Together/xAI HTML truncation issue
context_notes: Pipeline is now 10/13 providers working (135 models). Article generation works with content. The remaining 3 providers (together, xai, amazon) need HTML truncation improvements or page-specific adapters.
